title: ErrorEnvelope
description: STEPWORK unified error envelope (SYSTEM_SPEC §16). All errors returned to callers MUST be wrapped in this envelope.

code.description: Stable error code in UPPER_SNAKE_CASE with category prefix (e.g. AGENT_PERMISSION_DENIED). See SYSTEM_SPEC §16 for the category list.

retryable.description: Whether the caller may retry this operation without changing inputs

details.description: Optional structured details (field-level errors, provider responses, stack fingerprints). MUST NOT contain secrets.

correlationId.description: Correlation identifier linking this error to logs / audit events

userAction.description: Optional actionable guidance for the user to resolve the error (e.g. "Grant project:read scope in Agent Connections")
